title: Machine learning methods and systems for variety profile index crop characterization
abstract: A system includes one or more processors; and one or more non-transitory, computer-readable media including instructions that, when executed by the one or more processors, cause the computing system to: receive a machine data set; process the machine data set with a trained deep learning model to generate predicted variety profile index values; and cause a visualization to be displayed.
claims: 1. A computing system, comprising: one or more processors; and one or more non-transitory, computer-readable media having stored thereon instructions that, when executed by the one or more processors, cause the computing system to: receive a machine data set corresponding to an agricultural field, wherein the agricultural field includes a plurality of crop plants; process the machine data set using an artificial neural network to generate one or more predicted variety profile index values corresponding to the agricultural field; and generate an executable electronic agricultural prescription file for the agricultural field by processing the one or more predicted variety profile index values.
